trickyParts: coalesceValue() skips empty strings, so empty-string backend/runtime needed special backendValue/runtimeValue fallback logic to preserve existing throws-on-empty-string behavior
subscribeWorkerToEnvoy is exported and called from both server.ts and index.ts, so envoyUrl had to be added as a parameter (not closure-captured)
buildControllerEnv() was augmented to emit ENVOY_URL based on cross-family review finding that spawned sessions otherwise ignore --envoy-url
deviations: Added ENVOY_URL to buildControllerEnv() output — not in original plan but required for --envoy-url to propagate to controller subprocess (identified during cross-family review)
openQuestions: --port flag is parsed by loadConfig but allocatePort() in startDaemon() overwrites config.daemonPort — same behavior as LEGION_DAEMON_PORT env var always had (pre-existing design, not introduced by this PR)
When --projects first entry differs from positional team arg, team wins per plan notes — may want to validate they match or warn
